features.name: PhylocanvasGL Phylogenetic Tree Viewer
features.description: Interactive WebGL-accelerated viewer for rendering phylogenetic trees from Newick data, registered as a Datagrok viewer type. Backed by a singleton service that other components can query.
features.evidence_summary: PhylocanvasGL is the sole registered viewer; the service, demo app, readme, and 1.2.9 changelog entry all refer to the same PhylocanvasGL name root.

features.name: Tree-in-Grid / Newick Cell Renderer
features.description: Embeds phylogenetic tree thumbnails directly inside Datagrok grid cells, allowing users to view per-row trees alongside tabular data. Implemented by the TreeToGrid and TreeInGridCell utilities.
features.evidence_summary: TreeToGrid and TreeInGridCell share the 'tree in grid' concept; the 1.2.9 changelog explicitly describes the Newick cell renderer for trees in grid.

features.name: Newick File Import
features.description: Lets users open a Newick-format file and inject its tree data into an existing PhylocanvasGL viewer instance.
features.evidence_summary: injectTree is the only file-import entry point, described as 'Opens Newick file', and its signature takes a viewer + two string arguments (path/content).

features.name: Tree Cut / Subtree Extraction
features.description: Provides the ability to cut a phylogenetic tree at a threshold and return the resulting subtree as a new tree object, enabling downstream analysis on clades.
features.evidence_summary: TreeCutAsTree is a standalone demo/utility with a self-describing name (cut → as tree) and no shared naming with other features.
